gold: Bir dakika. İsmimde Ahmet Aslan dediniz de, Ahmet Arslan. R harfi var arada, Ahmet Arslan.
predicted: Bir dakika, Ahmet isminde Ahmet Aslan dediniz Ahmet Arslan. R harfi var arada Ahmet Arslan.

sigWerNormalizedGold: Bir dakika. İsmimde Ahmet Aslan dediniz de, Ahmet Arslan. R harfi var arada, Ahmet Arslan.
sigWerNormalizedPredicted: Bir dakika. İsminde Ahmet Aslan dediniz, Ahmet Arslan. R harfi var arada, Ahmet Arslan.

sigWerErrors.reason: 'İsmimde' (in my name) vs 'İsminde' (in the name) changes the reference from self to general, but in this context, the meaning is only slightly affected and the sentence remains understandable.
The only difference is the comma, which should be ignored according to the guidance.
Omitting 'de' (which means 'also' or 'as for') slightly changes the nuance but does not derail the meaning of the sentence.
